# PathPilot

> Free AI-powered career guidance for students and professionals — personalized advice, learning roadmaps, free resources, and curated opportunities like GSoC, LFX, ICPC, and Meta Hacker Cup.

## Pages
- [Dashboard](/): Overview, featured opportunities, and quick AI ask.
- [Opportunities](/opportunities): Curated and AI-discovered tech opportunities across open source, contests, hackathons, internships, scholarships, and fellowships.
- [Roadmaps](/roadmaps): Step-by-step career roadmaps plus AI-generated custom paths.
- [Resources](/resources): Hand-picked free learning resources.
- [AI Advisor](/advisor): Chat-based AI career advisor.
